Description: A man over-exerts himself exercising; a groundskeeper is cut by his chainsaw; an explosion occurs at a retirement community; May gets an emergency call from a suicidal teen.

Subject: 9-1-1 - Brawl in Cell Block 9-1-1
Description: Responding to a fire at a prison, Bobby and the 118 find themselves trapped in a deadly riot.

Subject: 9-1-1 - Ghost Stories
Description: A man claims he was carjacked, shot and buried alive; a homeowner thinks her roommate is a ghost; Hen receives a visit from the past; Athena and family are concerned that Harry is still haunted by visions of Jeffrey.

Subject: 9-1-1 - Defend in Place
Description: Bobby and the 118 race to save lives after an explosion rocks the hospital where Dr. David Hale is performing surgery; Michael makes a life-changing decision.

Subject: 9-1-1 - Suspicion
Description: The members of the 118 make calls to save a bridezilla at a disastrous wedding; Hen plays medical detective when her mother falls ill; Eddie and Christopher receive a visit from Carla; Athena uncovers a secret Bobby has been hiding.

Subject: 9-1-1 - Survivors
Description: Athena and the 118 are on high alert when a sniper is targeting members of the LAFD; Maddie makes a life decision.

Subject: 9-1-1 - Panic
Description: A series of ransomware threats leads to emergencies for the 118, including a helicopter crash at a hospital and an air traffic control tower system failure; the case of the realtor serial rapist goes to trial.

Subject: The Office - Office Olympics
Description: While Michael and Dwight are away from the office, Jim and Pam organize an office Olympics where employees compete in ridiculous games.

Subject: The Office - The Fire
Description: A small fire in the kitchen forces the staff to wait in the parking lot; Jim suggests a game of Desert Island; Michael tries to impress Ryan.

Subject: The Office - Halloween
Description: Halloween is not much fun for Michael when he learns he must fire someone; Jim and Pam put Dwight's CV on the internet.

Subject: The Office - The Fight
Description: When Dwight karate-chops Michael in the stomach at work, a lunchtime rematch is quickly organised; things become awkward between Pam and Jim.

Subject: The Office - The Client
Description: Michael and Jan try to land a new client by taking him out to Chili's; back in the office, Jim finds a script written by Michael and the workers cannot resist acting it out.

Subject: The Office - Performance Review
Description: Everyone is on edge during performance review, including Michael, who steals the employee suggestion box to get ideas he can present to his boss.

Subject: The Office - E-Mail Surveillance
Description: When Michael begins monitoring their e-mails, he manages to upset all of the employees.

Subject: The Office - Christmas Party
Description: After Michael suggests a game of ``Yankee Swap`` with the Secret Santa gifts, everyone fights over Michael's gift to Ryan, bringing morale to an all-time low.

Subject: The Office - Booze Cruise
Description: When Michael takes the Mifflin crew on a motivational harbor cruise, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig.

Subject: The Office - The Injury
Description: After he has an accident while using a grill, injured Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office.

Subject: The Office - The Secret
Description: Because Jim fears Michael will tell the others he likes Pam, he pretends to be Michael's best friend.

Subject: The Office - The Carpet
Description: When someone stains the carpet in Michael's office, he begins to question his popularity among his staff.

Subject: The Office - Boys and Girls
Description: When Jan conducts a seminar for the female employees, Michael takes the guys to the warehouse for some male bonding.

Subject: The Office - Dwight's Speech
Description: When Dwight, who has a fear of public speaking, is asked to give a speech at a sales convention, he turns to Michael for help.

Subject: The Office - Take Your Daughter to Work Day
Description: Michael strikes up a friendship with the 5-year-old daughter of his enemy when children visit the office.

Subject: The Office - Michael's Birthday
Description: Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin employees ice skating to celebrate his birthday; Kevin waits nervously for test results.

Subject: Sex and the City - The Good Fight
Description: Living with Aidan suffocates Carrie; Samantha grows closer to Richard; Miranda wonders if pregnancy precludes sex.

Subject: Sex and the City - All That Glitters
Description: Carrie wants to maintain her lifestyle; Samantha resists acknowledging her feelings for Richard; Charlotte and Trey grow apart.

Subject: Sex and the City - Change of a Dress
Description: Aidan pushes for a wedding date; Samantha fears an open relationship with Richard; Charlotte spices up her routine.

Subject: Sex and the City - Ring a Ding Ding
Description: Carrie's money woes make her insecure; Richard showers expensive gifts on Samantha; Miranda and Steve deal with parenthood.

Subject: Sex and the City - A Vogue Idea
Description: Carrie starts working at Vogue; Samantha fulfills Richard's birthday wish; Charlotte gives Miranda a baby shower.

Subject: Sex and the City - I Heart NY
Description: Carrie learns Mr. Big is leaving town; Samantha is suspicious of Richard's lunch dates; Charlotte fears dating again.

Subject: Sex and the City - Anchors Away
Description: Samantha debates reconciling with Richard; Miranda copes with the life changes babies bring.

Subject: Sex and the City - Unoriginal Sin
Description: Carrie gets surprising news; Miranda and Steve have Brady baptized; Samantha struggles with Richard's intentions.

Subject: Sex and the City - Luck Be an Old Lady
Description: The girls celebrate Charlotte's 36th birthday with a trip to Atlantic City, N.J.; Samantha decides to deal with Richard's wandering ways once and for all.

Description: Miranda joins Weight Watchers; Charlotte and Samantha deal with relationship issues; Carrie tries to create a book cover.

Description: Carrie obsesses about Aidan's negative critique; Charlotte prepares to fight for her apartment; Samantha has a talent for baby-sitting.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Between the Lines
Description: When an undercover agent is executed by a gang, the team must locate the mole before other agents are put in danger; Granger begins to worry when Kensi disappears in Afghanistan.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Zero Days
Description: The team is called in to determine if the system that controls Russian missiles is at risk after Eric overhears his friend, a computer systems expert, being attacked during online game play.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Spoils of War
Description: After learning that the Taliban may be responsible for Special Agent Kensi Blye's disappearance, Hetty sends the team to Afghanistan to rescue her.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Windfall
Description: Nell joins Deeks in the field on a case involving a former Marine who is being tracked by al-Qaida after embezzling money from Iraq.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Three Hearts
Description: When an undercover NCIS agent is suspected of working for the smuggler he's supposed to be investigating, the team takes him into custody to find his true intentions.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - One More Chance
Description: When software for a new, unmanned aerial vehicle goes missing and the lead engineer's 10-year-old daughter disappears, Sarah is convinced the two are related.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Exposure
Description: The team investigates when a news reporter names the people responsible for a deadly explosion at a charity event sponsored by the military.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Deep Trouble
Description: The team discovers the cartel's plan to transport cocaine to the U.S. from Colombia using a submarine; Hetty must go to Washington.

Subject: NCIS: Los Angeles - Deep Trouble, Part II
Description: The team tries to find Callen and Sam, who are trapped in a submarine set by terrorists to hit an aircraft carrier in San Diego; against orders, Hetty forgoes her trip to Washington.

Subject: The Office - Drug Testing
Description: Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot and launches a full investigation; Michael asks an unusual favor.

Subject: The Office - Conflict Resolution
Description: Chaos ensues when Michael takes responsibility for conflict resolution from the Human Relations department.

Subject: The Office - Gay Witch Hunt
Description: Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee; the situation with Jim and Pam.

Subject: The Office - The Convention
Description: Michael organizes a party in his hotel room when he, Dwight and Jan attend the Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention in Philadelphia.

Subject: The Office - The Coup
Description: After Jan busts Michael for having a ``movie Monday,`` Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job.

Subject: The Office - Grief Counseling
Description: Michael tries to help the staff grieve after learning that the former regional manager has died.

Subject: The Office - Initiation
Description: Dwight takes Ryan on his first sales call, subjecting him to an outrageous series of tests along the way.

Subject: Botched Presents: Plastic Surgery Rewind - Know Thy-Selfie
Description: The retreat guests are tested to see how willing they are to be stripped down in front of the cameras; Alan wrestles with the differing opinions on their butt; Brielle and Kim come to realize that chasing perfection runs in the family.

Subject: Botched - Jingle Bell Botched: Most Outrageous Patients Holiday Special
Description: A holiday countdown of most outrageous patients; Dr. Dubrow and Dr. Nassif see some over the top patients, including a human cartoon, viral butt implants, and a dynamic duo looking for their next surgeries.

Subject: Please Don't Destroy: The Treasure of Foggy Mountain (2023)
Description: It follows three friends who live together. When they realize that they don't like their life trajectory, they set off to find a gold treasure that is rumored to be buried in the nearby mountain.

Subject: Paid Programming
Description: Paid programming.

Subject: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
Description: Cut up to HALF the cost of your monthly cell phone bill. Same Towers. Same Coverage. But a LOT less money. It sounds great but is it too good to be true? Join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - New Mom Life
Description: Molly Yeh makes quick and easy recipes that let her spend more time enjoying her life as a new mom; she starts off with savory green pancakes for lunch, and then a hearty funeral hotdish and a crunchy romaine salad with breadcrumbs and dressing.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - Playdate
Description: Molly Yeh invites her sister-in-law and her baby Cliff over for a playdate with Bernie; Molly makes homemade granola bar treats, juicy falafel-spiced turkey burgers, grilled corn salad with a creamy avocado ranch and refreshing carrot apple juice.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - Sister, Sister!
Description: Molly Yeh makes a Greek-inspired meal for her sister, starting with yogurty marinated chicken skewers and perfectly packaged fried feta Greek salad pitas; then, there's skordalia, a creamy potato dip, served with herby grilled pita for dunking.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - Tutu Cute
Description: It is Bernie's tie-dye birthday party, and Molly Yeh is celebrating her tutu-loving daughter with a tie-dye tutu birthday cake; she's loading up the snack table with swirly yogurt queso with cilantro cream, little bean burritos and tiny taco salads.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - Healthy New Year
Description: Molly Yeh's sister-in-law, Anna, is visiting the farm with her new baby, Cliff, and she's asked Auntie Molly to make her favorite healthy meal.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - Nap Time Meal Done Juuust Right!
Description: Molly Yeh makes a delicious dinner during naptime; she sneaks away to prepare Slow Cooker Asian Wedding Soup, one-Dish Salmon and Veggies, Tamagoyaki and a Red Bean Snacking Cake with Yogurt Glaze.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Herbalicious
Description: Creating dishes with homegrown herbs including lemon-rosemary scones, French onion soup with fresh thyme, panzanella salad with basil, raita with salted naan wedges.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Fresh and Fast
Description: Ree Drummond puts a fresh spin on dinner with a one-pan chicken cauliflower skillet, saucy rustic turkey meatball pasta and an extra-fast orange ginger steak stir-fry; she also cooks grilled pita pizzas piled high with vegetables for a solo supper.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Almost Healthy
Description: Ree Drummond makes almost-healthy and fabulous versions of classics.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Low Carb Lusciousness
Description: Grilled pork tenderloin with baby bok choy; pizza with cauliflower crust and spicy pizza sauce; roasted shrimp with cherry tomatoes; roasted lemon-chile broccoli.

Subject: The Kitchen
Description: Spend a fun and food-filled morning in The Kitchen with a group of talented food experts who bring fun conversation and delicious recipes into your kitchen every week.

Subject: The Kitchen - Salad School
Description: Jeff Mauro uses historic grains for his blistered tomato and farro shrimp salad; Alex Guarnaschelli gets scientific with a chicken caesar salad; Geoffrey Zakarian leads French class with a salade lyonnaise.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - College-Town Champs
Description: Guy's rolling into college towns; in Columbus, Ohio, a pierogi paradise dishing out their specialties and a barbecue truck smoking premiere pork; in Boulder, Colorado, a legit Thai joint serving knockout noodles and off-the-chain chicken.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Breakfast, Brisket and Belly
Description: In Los Angeles, a late-night spot serves breakfast with a twist, like drunken French toast; in Columbus, Ohio, a funky joint serves creative combos like brisket on corn cakes; in Phoenix, a barbecue stop smokes up prime rib and pork belly dumplings.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - East Coast, West Coast
Description: A Palo Alto, Calif., joint serves spicy pork and knockout gnocchi; a bakery-restaurant in Wilmington, N.C., makes major meatloaf and fries up French toast with a fantastic twist; a Puerto Rican party spot in Oakland, Calif., mixes it up with mofongo.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Culinary Journey
Description: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey; on the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup is making a name for itself for leaving diners speechless.

Description: In Atlanta, a funky Asian spot puts out prime-time pork belly and wok-fried chicken; in Vancouver, an elevated diner dishes out duck pancakes and not-your-momma's meatloaf; in Kennewick, Wash., a brewpub pairs pints with house-made sausages.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Burger and Breakfast

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Family Meals
Description: Two brothers-in-law carry on a decades-long seafood tradition; a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop; father-son meat masters firing up killer char-becue.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Off the Beaten Path
Description: In Richmond is a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavor; in Reno is a sandwich spot going loco with the bird and putting a unique twist on the breakfast burrito.

Description: Guy Fieri dives into unordinary recipes, starting in Palm Beach,Fla., where a hidden restaurant serves up seafood and chow-chow; a funky Filipino joint in Hawaii fires up its spin on pigs' feet.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Taste of the Tropics
Description: Guy Fieri is loading up on tropical flavor, starting in a Florida spot serving up lobster enchiladas and lionfish rolls.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - From Chicken to Cheesesteak
Description: Guy Fieri is digging into chicken and some crazy creations; in Palm Springs, Calif., a crepe spot is all about the savory, while a joint is cooking real deal Mexican pollo; an Egyptian food truck is serving wings and a falafel waffle.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Burger, Bird and Meaty Italian
Description: Guy Fieri dives into a meaty smorgasbord, starting with a funky Nashville joint that serves a skyscraper burger; in New Smyrna Beach, Fla., a chef cooks up real deal gnocchi, and an out-of-this-world spot goes huge with a monster pork chop.

Subject: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives - Mexican, Mediterranean and Mofongo
Description: Guy Fieri's grabbing an international playlist of flavor; in Florida, a funky spot is putting a Mediterranean spin on burgers, while a local gem is dishing out Puerto Rican specialties; in Las Vegas, a real deal Mexican joint has bomb birria tacos.

Description: Guy Fieri's diving into killer culinary and cocktails; in San Antonio, TX, a Mexican spot is going over-the-top with scratch-made torta ahogada; a funky spot in Brunswick, GA, is serving up fried chicken and creative cocktails in a hidden speakeasy.

Subject: Delicious Miss Brown - How Does Her Garden Grow
Description: Kardea Brown throws a garden party for her girlfriends, showcasing locally grown ingredients; she prepares Creamy Leek and Steak Pasta, Low Country Style Shrimp Toasts with House Pickled Okra, Mixed Berry Crumble and White Sangria.

Subject: Delicious Miss Brown - Aw, Shucks!
Description: Kardea Brown invites some friends over for a classic Southern oyster roast with a light and hearty makeover; she prepares roasted oysters with Thai chili mignonette, crab rangoon wonton cups, easy Brunswick stew and slow cooker black cherry cobbler.

Subject: Delicious Miss Brown - Lighter Side of Soul Food
Description: Kardea Brown cooks up light, classic Southern dishes; veggie soup bunch inspired by Grandma; flaky pecan and panko-crusted baked fish with mashed parsnips; blackberry lavender cornmeal cake.

Subject: Delicious Miss Brown - A Garden Grows
Description: Kardea Brown cooks up a fresh veggie and herb-inspired meal; veggie soul rolls stuffed with collard greens, carrots, cabbage and rice; she grills lamb chops with a mint pesto and makes a no-bake Carolina Mud Pie.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Low-Carb Party Bites
Description: Ree Drummond is prepares for a party by making a tasty lineup of low-carb appetizers; sausage stuffed mushrooms; make-ahead zucchini roll ups; baked brie a la Ree; jalapeno cheese crisps; salmon and cucumber bites; Spanish marinated olives.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Meatless Marvels
Description: Ree Drummond stocks her kitchen with the ingredients for some of her favorite meatless meals; she whips up broccoli cheese baked potatoes, Greek grilled eggplant steaks, roasted vegetable panzanella, Italian cornbread, and tofu lettuce wraps.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Ree's New Garden
Description: Ree Drummond is adding her fresh garden ingredients to recipes, starting with moist chocolate zucchini muffins; Ree also makes easy best ever pesto, a tomato sandwich, a green goddess chopped salad and spicy herb garden butter.

Subject: The Pioneer Woman - Healthy 16-Minute Meals
Description: Heavenly hummus wrap; flavorful ginger steak salad; grilled nectarine salad; spicy cauliflower stir-fry.

Description: Molly Yeh celebrates St. Patty's Day on the farm with some extra green; she gets cooking with a cheesy zucchini feta pesto lasagna.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - New Farm Traditions
Description: Molly puts a fresh spin on the classic farm lunch with her easy garlic and onion challah bread, chopped salad with crumbled feta, and creamy homemade hummus; for a sweet bite, Molly makes olive oil blondies with chocolate frosting and sprinkles.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - The Big Till
Description: Molly is making an easy and hearty lunch for the Hagen family farmers, and she's using some of her favorite pantry staples to fill them up on a budget; she starts by making cheesy meatball-stuffed biscuits and a side dish with a little kick.

Subject: Girl Meets Farm - Parents' Payback
Description: Molly makes dinner for her in-laws to say thanks for all their help; the menu includes knoephla sausage hotdish, sweet and smoky roasted squash hummus with Bernie-inspired veggie focaccia for dunking, and buttery kitty cookies for dessert.

Subject: The Kitchen - Eat Your Greens
Description: Sunny Anderson prepares a green goddess salmon burger; guest chef Antonia Lofaso contributes a sausage and broccoli rabe hero; Jeff Mauro rounds out the menu with an innovative meatball salad.

Subject: The Kitchen - Eat the Rainbow
Description: Sunny Anderson puts a lemon spin on easy and bright whipped ricotta with charred rosemary bread, Katie Lee Biegel tosses a fresh spring cobb salad, and Geoffrey Zakarian makes grilled lamb chops.

Subject: Guy's Grocery Games - Relay: All-Star Moms vs. Dads
Description: Guy Fieri invites three all-star chef moms and three all-star chef dads to a team relay showdown; the teammates work on their dish one at a time in shifts.

Subject: Guy's Grocery Games - Relay: Ultimate Face-Off
Description: Guy Fieri sets up the ultimate face-off with a relay between two teams to create a spicy champion's dinner; working blind, the chefs in the later shifts cook and present dishes based on their best guess of what the teammate before them was making.

Subject: Guy's Grocery Games - Relay: Winners vs. Judges
Description: Guy Fieri hosts a team competition between three previous winners and three judges; working one at a time, only the first chef is told that they're making a seafood platter, while the remaining chefs will have to guess what they're preparing.

Subject: Guy's Grocery Games - Wilderness Chefs
Description: Guy Fieri sends talented chefs running through the aisles of Flavortown Market for the chance to make some serious dough. They face real-world challenges as they compete to be the last chef standing in this high-stakes cooking competition.

Subject: Guy's Grocery Games - Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches
Description: Guy Fieri invites three ''Diners, Drive-Ins, and Dives'' chefs to compete in a sandwich showdown; the chefs make a sandwich using nine ingredients or fewer and build a stacked and jacked sandwich with sammie whammies for a chance to earn $20,000.

Subject: Guy's Grocery Games - All-Star Pizza
Description: Guy Fieri invites all-star chefs Maneet Chauhan, Christian Petroni, Adam Sobel and Stephanie Izard for a pizza showdown; the pie makers must serve up a pizzeria combo plate using only the grocery items they can carry on a pizza paddle.

Subject: Worst Cooks in America - Reality Check: Lights, Camera, Boot Camp
Description: Chefs Jeff Mauro and Tiffany Derry are ready to mold a new batch of celebrity recruits into kitchen MVPs; first, the celebs whip up red-carpet-worthy dishes to show off their culinary chops; then, the chefs teach their teams spicy piri piri chicken.

Subject: Beat Bobby Flay - Too Hot to Handle
Description: Carla Hall and Sean Evans team up with chefs Chris Binotto and Darian Hernandez to challenge Bobby Flay to a food battle.

Description: Chef Antonia Lofaso partners with comedian Leslie Jones to bring the nuttiness, as chefs Josh Elliot and Vicky Colas attempt to get the last laugh over Bobby Flay.

Description: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

Subject: Bones - The Corpse on the Canopy
Description: When Angela and Hodgins wake to find a corpse in their bedroom, they believe Pelant is behind it; against Booth's wishes, Angela and Hodgins start their own investigation.

Subject: Planet Earth - Mountains
Description: Touring the mightiest mountain ranges.

Subject: Planet Earth - Seasonal Forests
Description: The trees of the Taiga forest; giant sequoia, the largest living thing on the planet.

Subject: Planet Earth - Ocean Deep
Description: Time lapse footage taken from 2,000m down captures eels, crabs and isopods.

Subject: Planet Earth - Ice Worlds
Description: New science about the dynamics of emperor penguin behavior and aerial images of a polar bear swimming.

Description: An examination of the often-not-seen life that inhabits the deserts of Earth.

Description: A humpback whale and her calf; pygmy seahorses; seals attack king penguins.

Subject: Planet Earth - Jungles
Description: Jungles cover roughly three percent of our planet, yet contain a staggering 50 percent of the world's species; uncovering the strategies the inhabitants adopt in order to survive in this competitive environment; narrated by David Attenborough.

Subject: Planet Earth - Great Plains
Description: The bizarre looking Tibetan fox and lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

Subject: Planet Earth - Freshwater
Description: The descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea.

Description: A freewheeling Detroit cop pursuing a murder investigation finds himself dealing with the very different culture of Beverly Hills.

Subject: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
Description: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks.

Subject: Seven Worlds, One Planet - South America
Description: From the bone-dry deserts of the Atacama, where penguins weave their way through a minefield of snapping sea lions, to the lush cloud forests of the Andes, South America is full of unusual and ingenious wildlife.

Subject: Nature's Great Events - The Great Migration
Description: The cameras follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive until the return of the great migration; as weeks turn to months, the pride members become frailer, and the number of cubs dwindles from seven to two.

Subject: Nature's Great Events - The Great Salmon Run
Description: An amazing look at the annual return of millions of salmon to the streams where they were born; the survival of North American grizzly bears depends on this natural event.

Subject: Nature's Great Events - The Great Tide
Description: A look at the sardine run, which happens each winter along the South African coast, and the predators that wait for them.

Subject: Nature's Great Events - The Great Flood
Description: The great flood in the Okavango turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into a wetland, drawing in millions of animals including elephants and hippos.

Subject: Nature's Great Events - The Great Feast
Description: Every summer in the seas of Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life, the plankton bloom; it transforms these seas into the richest on Earth, but these animals may not survive to enjoy the great feast.

Description: A motorcycle stuntman who sold his soul to save a loved one becomes a fiery agent for justice at night in the presence of evil.

Subject: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance (2011)
Description: Johnny Blaze (Nicolas Cage) gets a chance to rid himself of the Ghost Rider curse forever when members of a secret church hire him to save a boy from Satan (Ciarán Hinds).

Subject: Underworld (2003)
Description: A female vampire tries to protect a medical student from werewolves intent on creating a hybrid species.

Subject: Law & Order - Criminal Law
Description: When detectives investigate a series of seemingly random murders, they find a hit list that includes Jack McCoy; he realizes the people on the list are jurors from trial of a multiple murderer he prosecuted years ago.

Subject: Law & Order - Acid
Description: When Lt. Van Buren's college friend's daughter is found dead, she leads a no-holds-barred mission to catch the serial assailant who attacked her in the past.

Subject: Law & Order - Bible Story
Description: Religious tempers flare when a man is killed after desecrating a treasured edition of the Hebrew Torah.

Subject: Law & Order - Family Friend
Description: An officer exacts revenge upon his friend's alleged killer and tries to avoid prosecution by threatening to expose tainted evidence from previous cases.

Subject: Law & Order - Heart of Darkness
Description: Though a journalist's death in a bathtub looks like suicide, hand marks on his shoulders and pills from an ex's prescription suggest foul play.

Subject: Law & Order - Magnet
Description: A promising Hispanic student at a specialist school is strangled; Fontana and Green soon learn the victim was selling test answers and writing papers for more privileged students.

Subject: Law & Order - Choice of Evils
Description: A woman says she killed her teenage son out of fear that he would follow in his criminal father's footsteps.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Fright Night
Description: Frightened promoters fix a fight.

Subject: The Three Stooges - The Ghost Talks
Description: Peeping Tom's ghost wants to meet Lady Godiva.

Subject: Bones - The Twist in the Plot
Description: The team investigates when two bodies are found at the same burial plot; Brennan and Booth discuss after-death arrangements; Daisy returns for the first time since the breakup.

Subject: Bones - The Doll in the Derby
Description: When a female roller derby skater is killed and dismembered, Angie goes under cover to help solve the case; Cam tries to learn more about Booth's secretive hospital appointments.

Subject: Bones - The Shot in the Dark
Description: While in the hospital after being shot at the lab, Brennan struggles with visions of her mother that defy her usual logic; evidence may link Brennan's attacker to the Jeffersonian.

Subject: Bones - The Friend in Need
Description: As the team investigates the death of a seemingly innocent 15-year-old boy, they learn that he was involved in illegal activity.

Subject: Bones - The Fact in the Fiction
Description: When a well-educated but eccentric intern starts working at the Jeffersonian, Brennan tries to be more open-minded about scientific questions.

Subject: Underworld (2003)
Description: A female vampire tries to protect a medical student from werewolves intent on creating a hybrid species.

Subject: G.I. Jane (1997)
Description: A female Navy SEALs recruit (Demi Moore) completes rigorous training under a tough officer's (Viggo Mortensen) command.

Subject: The Guardian (2006)
Description: A trainer (Kevin Costner) in a Coast Guard program for rescue swimmers turns a cocky recruit (Ashton Kutcher) into his protege and takes him on a mission to the Bering Strait.

Subject: White House Down (2013)
Description: While on a tour of the White House with his young daughter, a Capitol policeman springs into action to save his child and protect the president from a heavily armed group of paramilitary invaders.

Subject: Law & Order - Cost of Capital
Description: A murder victim, a young banking associate, has hundreds of thousands of dollars in a checking account, which may be a clue to the case.

Subject: Law & Order - America, Inc.
Description: Detectives believe vengeance is the motive for the shooting of a private military contractor, found dead in his hotel room.

Subject: Law & Order - Thinking Makes It So
Description: A bank executive must assist in a robbery in order to save his kidnapped daughter.

Subject: Law & Order - Positive
Description: A diner shooting leads detectives Fontana and Green to a desperate gunman seeking revenge for the death of his baby sister of AIDS at a children's hospital.

Subject: Law & Order - Kingmaker
Description: A newspaper reveals the identity of an undercover police officer, resulting in her murder, so Detectives Green and Fontana search for the source of the leak.

Subject: Law & Order - Hindsight
Description: Detective Falco finds slashed to death in his bathroom the young woman he took home the night before.

Subject: Law & Order - Invaders
Description: McCoy risks his career when he uses a corrupt DEA agent (Ritchie Coster) to lure psychopathic killers out of hiding.

Subject: Eden: Untamed Planet - Namib: Skeleton Coast and Beyond
Description: The Namib Desert is one of the oldest deserts of all; it's also one of the most diverse; with 50-degree temperatures and half a millimetre of rainfall annually.

Subject: Eden: Untamed Planet - Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
Description: At the far tip of South America lies a magical realm that seems frozen in time; known as ``the end of the world``, this is Patagonia.

Subject: Face/Off (1997)
Description: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

Subject: The Taking of Pelham 123 (2009)
Description: A subway dispatcher (Denzel Washington) calls on his extensive knowledge of the transit system to outwit hijackers who are threatening to kill passengers unless a ransom is paid.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Unfinished Business
Description: Gideon, Hotchner and their team reopen the unsolved case of a serial killer who has attacked someone for the first time in 20 years.

Subject: Criminal Minds - The Tribe
Description: The BAU team investigates the mass murder of college students, similar to wartime methods used by an Indian tribe long ago.

Subject: Criminal Minds - A Real Rain
Description: A series of murders in Manhattan seems random at first, then the police fear that a serial killer may be copying the crimes of another decades earlier.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Somebody's Watching
Description: Dr. Reid falls for a Hollywood starlet at the center of a murder investigation.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Machismo
Description: Gideon, Hotchner and their team head to Mexico to aid in the investigation of a serial killer who preys on the elderly.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Charm and Harm
Description: Gideon, Hotchner and their team race across the South in pursuit of a chameleonlike killer.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Secrets and Lies
Description: A leak of classified information from the CIA puts the lives of several operatives at risk, so the team works swiftly to expose the mole.

Subject: Seven Worlds, One Planet - Antarctica
Description: Icy Antarctica is a land of survivors enduring the most hostile conditions on Earth.

Subject: The Taking of Pelham 123 (2009)
Description: A subway dispatcher (Denzel Washington) calls on his extensive knowledge of the transit system to outwit hijackers who are threatening to kill passengers unless a ransom is paid.

Subject: Rocky Balboa (2006)
Description: Retired Rocky's (Sylvester Stallone) plan to re-enter the ring for a few small matches escalates into a full-fledged bout with the world's reigning heavyweight.

Subject: Rocky (1976)
Description: Heavyweight champ Apollo Creed gives Philadelphia club fighter Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone) a title shot.

Subject: Rocky II (1979)
Description: Underdog Philadelphia fighter Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone) gets another shot at heavyweight champ Apollo Creed.

Subject: Rocky III (1982)
Description: Following his crushing defeat by Clubber Lang, Rocky Balboa joins forces with Apollo Creed in an effort to regain his title.

Subject: Rocky IV (1985)
Description: Heavyweight champion Rocky Balboa trains in Siberia for a match against the Soviet fighter who killed Apollo Creed. In front of a ferocious Russian crowd, he fights for one final showdown.

Subject: Rocky V (1990)
Description: Broke, punchy and at odds with his son, boxer Rocky (Sylvester Stallone) trains a hungry contender, then must street-fight him.

Subject: NCIS - One Shot, One Kill
Description: A sniper kills Marine recruiters and leaves a white feather behind as his calling card.

Subject: NCIS - The Good Samaritan
Description: With the help of a local sheriff, Gibbs and his team hunt down a possible serial killer targeting naval officers.

Subject: NCIS - Enigma
Description: Gibbs puts it all on the line to help a former commanding officer who is running for his life from the government.

Subject: NCIS - Bete Noir
Description: A gun-toting man emerges from a body bag in the autopsy lab to take Ducky, Gerald and Kate hostage. Rudolf Martin guest stars.

Subject: NCIS - The Truth Is Out There
Description: Gibbs, still recovering from his gunshot wound, pushes the team to investigate the body of a bludgeoned sailor, found at an illegal nightclub.

Subject: NCIS - UnSEALed
Description: Gibbs and his team track a former Navy SEAL (guest star Tim Abell) who escapes from prison looking for revenge.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Heavenly Daze
Description: To get into heaven, Shemp must reform the Stooges.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Hoi Polloi
Description: A professor plays Pygmalion to three bumbling garbage men, the Stooges; he tries to turn them into gentlemen.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Three Little Pirates
Description: The marooned trio is condemned.

Subject: Bones - The Survivor in the Soap
Description: The team investigates the death of a young man whose remains were found at a hazardous waste disposal facility; Cam and Arastoo struggle to keep their relationship secret; Brennan and Booth try to decide where to take their vacation.

Subject: Bones - The Archaeologist in the Cocoon
Description: The team investigates the death of an archaeologist who had just made an important discovery.

Subject: Bones - The Diamond in the Rough
Description: When the team investigates the death of a dancer who was about to audition for a dance competition show, Booth and Brennan go under cover as contestants.

Subject: Bones - The Ghost in the Machine
Description: When a psychic tries to help the spirit of a boy whose death the team is investigating, members of the team start to question their own feelings on life and death.

Subject: Bones - The But in the Joke
Description: When a street artist falls into his own adhesive, he also lands on human remains that stay glued to his body; Booth searches a comedy club for suspects.

Subject: Law & Order - New York Minute
Description: Detectives link the owner of a trucking company to the smuggling of illegal aliens and suspect a citizens border-patrol member of his killing.

Description: Tune into ACC Network's daily news and information show - with the biggest storylines and best guests from across the ACC.

Subject: CFP Quarterfinal at the Goodyear Cotton Bowl Classic - Miami vs. Ohio State
Description: The No. 10 Miami Hurricanes face the No. 2 Ohio State Buckeyes at AT&T Stadium. This is a high-stakes College Football Playoff Quarterfinal matchup. Miami advanced after a gritty 10-3 road upset over No. 7 Texas A&M in the CFP First Round.

Subject: College Basketball - Virginia Tech at Wake Forest
Description: Wake Forest hosts Virginia Tech at LJVM Coliseum on Saturday. Guard Juke Harris defends the home court against Hokies forward Amani Hansberry, who averages 16.3 points. Virginia Tech has won five straight, while the Demon Deacons come off a loss.

Subject: College Basketball - Boston College at Georgia Tech
Description: The Boston College Eagles travel to Atlanta to face the Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets. Entering the new year, Georgia Tech (9-4, 0-0 ACC) has found its rhythm, riding a four-game winning streak. Donald Hand Jr. leads the Eagles in scoring (15.8 PPG).

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Notre Dame at Georgia Tech
Description: The Yellow Jackets host the No. 18 Fighting Irish for a New Year's ACC matchup. Hannah Hidalgo leads the Irish offense, averaging 25.1 points per game. Both teams battle for conference supremacy and look to gain critical ACC points.

Description: The Cardinals (8-4) line up against the Rockets (8-4) in the Boca Raton Bowl. Toledo won bowl games in two of the last three years, moving to 2-0 at the Boca Raton Bowl by beating Liberty in 2022. The Rockets are riding a four-game win streak.

Description: The No. 16 Louisville Cardinals take on the Stanford Cardinal at Maples Pavilion. The Cardinal (11-2) are anchored by guard Ebuka Okorie, who recently earned ACC Rookie of the Week honors. He is ranked near the top nationally in scoring (22.8 PPG).

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Indiana at Maryland
Description: No. 7 Maryland (14-0, 2-0) hosts Indiana (11-3, 0-2) for a Big Ten matchup. The unbeaten Terrapins face Shay Ciezki, who averages 23.7 points for the Hoosiers. Guard Oluchi Okananwa leads the defense for Maryland at the XFINITY Center.

Subject: College Basketball - Washington at Indiana
Description: The Hoosiers host the Huskies in Bloomington. Indiana leads the all-time series 4-1, including a 16-point win last March. Hannes Steinbach leads Washington into Assembly Hall after his 21-point, 14-rebound performance against San Diego.

Description: The Northeastern Huskies travel to North Carolina to battle against the Campbell Fighting Camels. Campbell (6-8, 0-1 CAA) is aiming to protect home court, while Northeastern (4-8, 0-1 CAA) is looking to snap a three-game losing streak.

Subject: College Basketball - Dayton at Loyola-Chicago
Description: The Dayton Flyers face the Loyola Chicago Ramblers in a key Atlantic-10 conference matchup at the Gentile Arena. Dayton (9-4) enters the contest looking to assert its dominance in the A-10, while Loyola Chicago (4-9) seeks a signature home win.

Subject: College Basketball - Oral Roberts at North Dakota State
Description: The Golden Eagles visit the Bison at the Scheels Center. The Bison have held the upper hand, winning the last four matchups dating back to January 2024. Their last meeting in February 2025 was a high-scoring affair that NDSU won 94-88 in overtime.

Subject: College Basketball - Davidson at Saint Joseph's

Subject: College Basketball - Wyoming at New Mexico

Subject: College Basketball - Boise State at San Diego State
Description: San Diego State hosts Boise State for a Mountain West game at Viejas Arena. Broncos center Drew Fielder leads the visitors, averaging 13.7 points per game. The Aztecs (7-4, 1-0 Mountain West) beat Whittier 121-59 in their last nonconference game.

Subject: NBA Basketball - Minnesota Timberwolves at Miami Heat
Description: The Timberwolves visit Kaseya Center to face the Heat. Miami leads the series 36-34. Bam Adebayo scored 29 in March, when Minnesota narrowly escaped a loss. Guard Anthony Edwards averages 29.3 points per game and leads the offense for the visitors.

Subject: NBA Basketball - Philadelphia 76ers at New York Knicks
Description: 76ers visit Knicks at Madison Square Garden. Tyrese Maxey leads Philadelphia with a 30.7 PPG. Jalen Brunson 29.5 PPG anchors the Knicks. Philadelphia Kelly Oubre Jr. faces knee injury as the seek to improve their standing in the Eastern Conference.

Subject: NBA Basketball - Boston Celtics at LA Clippers

Subject: College Football - Cheez-It Citrus Bowl: Michigan vs. Texas
